tasks.subject: Task 0: Database Schema & TypeScript Types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `industry`, `onboarding_completed`, and `walkthrough_completed` columns to the profiles table and update TypeScript types.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts:83-132`
- Run SQL in Supabase dashboard

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- profiles table has new columns
- TypeScript types updated
- Existing profiles default to false

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/integrations/supabase/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["profiles table has new columns", "TypeScript types updated", "Existing profiles default to false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Onboarding Status Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create useOnboardingStatus hook.

**Files:**

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useOnboardingStatus.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns correct status shape", "Queries profiles table", "Handles loading state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Onboarding Step Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the four step components plus progress indicator.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/onboarding/OnboardingProgress.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/onboarding/StepWelcome.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/onboarding/StepName.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/onboarding/StepPreferences.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/onboarding/StepReady.tsx`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/onboarding/OnboardingProgress.tsx", "src/components/onboarding/StepWelcome.tsx", "src/components/onboarding/StepName.tsx", "src/components/onboarding/StepPreferences.tsx", "src/components/onboarding/StepReady.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 5 components created", "Clean minimal design", "Form validation works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Route Integration & Onboarding Gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire onboarding into router and gate ProtectedRoute.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/App.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx`
- Modify: `src/pages/Auth.tsx`
- Modify: `src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx`
- Modify: `src/pages/Onboarding.tsx`

**Verify:** Full signup flow test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/App.tsx", "src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx", "src/pages/Auth.tsx", "src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx", "src/pages/Onboarding.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Route exists", "Gate works", "Signup redirects correctly", "Returning users skip onboarding"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Walkthrough Hook & Provider
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build walkthrough system with spotlight overlay and tooltips.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useWalkthrough.ts`
- Create: `src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughProvider.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughTooltip.tsx`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useWalkthrough.ts", "src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughProvider.tsx", "src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughTooltip.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Spotlight overlay works", "Tooltip positions correctly", "State persists to Supabase"]}
```
